short: 90% of churned users show a drop in key feature usage 14‑30 days before they vanish – if you’re only watching the cancellation page you’re missing the leak that costs you $1,200 this month. Scan the four data layers every Monday. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/where-reduce-saas-churn-data
title: Where Reduce SaaS Churn Data? The Missing Signals That Quietly Drain Your MRR
